chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI HCA No.50 of 2024 HCA No.51 of 2024 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGES HCA No.50 of 2024 1. For orders on CMA No.1756/24 2. For orders on CMA No.1757/24 3. For orders on CMA No.1758/24 4. For hearing of main case 5. For hearing of CMA No.276/24 6. For hearing of CMA No.277/24 HCA No.51 of 2024 1. For hearing of CMA No.3129/24 2. For hearing of CMA No.3130/24 3. For orders on office objection 4. For hearing of main case 5. For hearing of CMA No.280/24 6. For hearing of CMA No.281/24 21.05.2025 Mr. Muhammad Umar Athar, advocate for appellant in both appeals. Syed Muhammad Saulat Rizvi, advocate for respondent No.2/Contemnor in HCA No.51 of 2024 a/w Syed Muhammad Mehdi, advocate. Barrister Zeeshan Adhi, Additional Advocate General. Mr. Israr Hussain, Law Officer a/w Farhan Akhtar, Deputy Secretary (Admin), & Muhammad Abbas Balouch, Secretary. Mr. Muhammad Sohail Imran, Legal Officer. Mr. Khadim Hussain, Law Officer, Universities & Board Department Govt. ------- After arguing at some length, learned counsel for appellant does not press these appeals, which are accordingly, dismissed as not pressed alongwith listed applications. Office to place a copy of this order in the aforesaid connected matter. JUDGE JUDGE Hafiz
